Package actrie

Class AhoCorasickTrieFactory

java.lang.Object
actrie.AhoCorasickTrieFactory
public class AhoCorasickTrieFactory
extends java.lang.Object
A Factory to create AhoCorasickTries.
Since:
26.12.2020, Sa.
Author:
Markus Walder

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors 
    Constructor Description
    AhoCorasickTrieFactory()  

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static AhoCorasickTrie<ACTrieNode> createAhoCorasickTrieFromParams​(java.util.List<java.lang.String> keys, LanguageParameter parameters)
    Creates the AhoCorasickTrie using a default (ACTrieNode) to create the nodes.
    static <T extends ACTrieNode>
    AhoCorasickTrie<T>    		 createAhoCorasickTrieFromParamsWithNodeFactory​(java.util.List<java.lang.String> keys, LanguageParameter parameters, AbstractACNodeFactory<T> factory)
    Creates the AhoCorasickTrie using a custom node type.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • AhoCorasickTrieFactory

      public AhoCorasickTrieFactory()

  • Method Details

    • createAhoCorasickTrieFromParams

      public static AhoCorasickTrie<ACTrieNode> createAhoCorasickTrieFromParams​(java.util.List<java.lang.String> keys, LanguageParameter parameters)
      Creates the AhoCorasickTrie using a default (ACTrieNode) to create the nodes.
      Parameters:
      keys - List of Strings - the keys we want to use to build the AhoCorasickTrie
      parameters - a LanguageParameter defining the language used for the keys
      Returns:
      the new AhoCorasickTrie

    • createAhoCorasickTrieFromParamsWithNodeFactory

      public static <T extends ACTrieNode> AhoCorasickTrie<T> createAhoCorasickTrieFromParamsWithNodeFactory​(java.util.List<java.lang.String> keys, LanguageParameter parameters, AbstractACNodeFactory<T> factory)
      Creates the AhoCorasickTrie using a custom node type. The custom node type will be defined using an AbstractACNodeFactory.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The node type created by the factory.
      Parameters:
      keys - List of Strings - the keys we want to use to build the AhoCorasickTrie
      parameters - a LanguageParameter defining the language used for the keys
      factory - An implementation of AbstractACNodeFactory defining the creation of new nodes
      Returns:
      the new AhoCorasickTrie
